name: AppearanceSettingsState
summary: snapshot of the values in AppearanceSettings

properties.name: CommandPromptBackgroundColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the command prompt background color.

properties.name: CommandPromptFontName
properties.summary: Name of the font used in the command prompt

properties.name: CommandPromptFontSize
properties.summary: Size of the font used in the command prompt (in points)

properties.name: CommandPromptHypertextColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the command prompt hypertext color.

properties.name: CommandPromptTextColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the command prompt text color.

properties.name: CrosshairColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the crosshair color.

properties.name: CurrentLayerBackgroundColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used by the layer manager dialog as the background color for the current layer.

properties.name: DefaultFontFaceName
properties.summary: Gets or sets the name of the default font face.

properties.name: DefaultLayerColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default layer color.

properties.name: DefaultObjectColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the default object color.

properties.name: DirectionArrowIconHeadSize
properties.summary: Set the arrow icon head size.

properties.name: DirectionArrowIconShaftSize
properties.summary: Set the arrow icon shaft size.

properties.name: EchoCommandsToHistoryWindow
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if command names are written to the history window.

properties.name: EchoPromptsToHistoryWindow
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if prompt messages are written to the history window.

properties.name: EditCandidateColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of objects that are eligible to be edited.

properties.name: FeedbackColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the feedback color.

properties.name: FrameBackgroundColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the frame background color.

properties.name: GridThickLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the thick line in the grid.

properties.name: GridThinLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the thin line in the grid.

properties.name: GridXAxisLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of X axis line in the grid.

properties.name: GridYAxisLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of Y axis line in the grid.

properties.name: GridZAxisLineColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of Z axis line in the grid.

properties.name: LockedObjectColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used to draw locked objects.

properties.name: MenuVisible
properties.summary: Get/Set menu visibility

properties.name: PageviewPaperColor
properties.summary: CRhinoPageView paper background. A rectangle is drawn into the background of page views to represent the printed area. The alpha portion of the color is used to draw the paper blended into the background

properties.name: SelectedObjectColor
properties.summary: The color used to draw selected objects. The default is yellow, but this can be customized by the user.

properties.name: SelectionWindowCrossingFillColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used to fill a crossing selection window

properties.name: SelectionWindowCrossingStrokeColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used to draw the stroke of a crossing selection window

properties.name: SelectionWindowFillColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used to fill a selection window

properties.name: SelectionWindowStrokeColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color used to draw the stroke of a selection window

properties.name: ShowCrosshairs
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if cross hairs are visible.

properties.name: ShowFullPathInTitleBar
properties.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines if the full path of the document is shown in the Rhino title bar.

properties.name: ShowLayoutDropShadow
properties.summary: Display the drop shadow of layouts

properties.name: ShowStatusBar
properties.summary: Get/Set status bar visibility

properties.name: ShowTitleBar
properties.summary: Shows or hides title bar.

properties.name: ShowViewportTitles
properties.summary: Get/Set viewport title visibility

properties.name: TrackingColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the tracking color.

properties.name: ViewportBackgroundColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the viewport background color.

properties.name: ViewportTabsVisibleAtStart
properties.summary: Display viewport tabs at start

properties.name: WorldCoordIconXAxisColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the world X axis of the world coordinates icon, appearing usually bottom left in viewports.

properties.name: WorldCoordIconYAxisColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the world Y axis of the world coordinate icon, appearing usually bottom left in viewports.

properties.name: WorldCoordIconZAxisColor
properties.summary: Gets or sets the color of the world Z axis of the world coordinate icon, appearing usually bottom left in viewports.
